problem id: f55c1bf0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10110010 -> 11101111
  01010100 -> 01011111
  00011100 -> 00011111
  00000001 -> 10110111
  01100010 -> 01101111
  00000111 -> 00000111
  11100011 -> 00100111
  01000011 -> 00100111
  00111011 -> 11100111
  10110111 -> 10000111

query: 10001101
predicted answer: 11010111
